moments.title: World Cup Bronze Final: France vs England
moments.blurb: England takes on France in the 2026 FIFA World Cup third-place playoff today, after both teams suffered semi-final defeats.

angles.name: Match Preview
angles.copy: It's the Bronze Final! England faces France at 10 PM BST in the World Cup third-place playoff. Can the Three Lions bounce back from semi-final heartbreak with a win?

angles.name: Rivalry Angle
angles.copy: England vs France: A classic rivalry takes to the pitch for the World Cup's third place. Who are you backing tonight? Kick-off 10 PM BST.

moments.title: World Cup Final: Argentina vs Spain
moments.blurb: The 2026 FIFA World Cup culminates tomorrow as Argentina faces Spain in the highly anticipated final.

angles.name: Final Hype
angles.copy: The biggest game of the year is almost here! Argentina vs Spain in the World Cup Final tomorrow at 8 PM BST. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Sunday Plans
angles.copy: Clear your diary for tomorrow night! It's Argentina vs Spain in the World Cup Final, 8 PM BST kick-off. Where are you watching it?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Latest
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold the UK Singles Chart #1 for a 17th non-consecutive week with 'Rein Me In,' while World Cup anthems and new entries shake up the Top 40.

angles.name: #1 Dominance
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' makes it a massive 17 non-consecutive weeks at UK #1. Incredible!

angles.name: World Cup Chart Impact
angles.copy: Football's coming home... to the charts! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' climbs to #2 and 'Three Lions' roars to #3 thanks to World Cup fever.

angles.name: New Entry Spotlight
angles.copy: Fresh sound alert! Olivia Rodrigo's 'honeybee' buzzes into the UK Top 40 at #30 this week. Have you heard it yet?

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festival 2026 Anticipation
moments.blurb: Anticipation is building for Reading & Leeds Festival, taking place August 27-30, 2026, with headliners including Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, Fontaines D.C., Chase & Status Live, and RAYE.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Summer's biggest weekend is just over a month away! Reading & Leeds Festival returns Aug 27-30 with a massive lineup. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Headliner Hype
angles.copy: Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, RAYE... Reading & Leeds is stacked! Get ready for a huge bank holiday weekend of music.

moments.title: England Rugby vs Argentina
moments.blurb: England's rugby team faces Argentina tonight in the Nations Championship, kicking off at 8:10 PM BST on ITV1.

angles.name: Rugby Night
angles.copy: From football to rugby! England takes on Argentina in the Nations Championship tonight at 8:10 PM BST on ITV1. Come on England!

angles.name: Sporting Double Bill
angles.copy: Double bill of England sport tonight! After the football, switch over for England Rugby vs Argentina at 8:10 PM BST.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his iconic fusion of rock, Latin, and blues, turns 79 on July 20.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! What's your favourite Santana track to chill out or dance to?

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring genius of Carlos Santana, who turns 79 on July 20. His guitar riffs are truly timeless.

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, the iconic drummer and vocalist for The Eagles and a successful solo artist, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22.

angles.name: Eagles Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley of The Eagles! What's your favourite song he sang lead on?

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to 'Boys of Summer', celebrating Don Henley's 79th birthday on July 22. A true rock icon.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music and iconic performances, turns 57 on July 24.

angles.name: JLo Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! The one and only JLo, Jennifer Lopez, turns 57 on July 24. What's your go-to JLo banger?

angles.name: Dance Floor Queen
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to the queen of the dance floor, Jennifer Lopez! She turns 57 on Thursday. Let's get loud!

moments.title: Happy 75th Birthday, Verdine White
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the legendary bassist and founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on July 25.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Icon
angles.copy: Shining bright! Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire on July 25. What's your favourite EWF anthem?

angles.name: Timeless Bassist
angles.copy: Celebrating the funky bass lines and enduring legacy of Verdine White, turning 75 this Friday. Earth, Wind & Fire forever!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on July 26.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on July 26. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Enduring Legend
angles.copy: 83 years young! Celebrating the timeless energy and impact of Mick Jagger this Sunday. The Rolling Stones legend continues.

moments.title: Happy 77th Birthday, Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the iconic drummer for the legendary band Queen, turns 77 on July 26.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating! Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor, on July 26.

angles.name: Drummer Love
angles.copy: We will, we will rock you! Wishing a fantastic 77th birthday to Queen's Roger Taylor this Sunday.

moments.title: Mixed UK Summer Weather
moments.blurb: After a period of heatwave conditions, the UK is experiencing mixed summer weather, with temperatures cooling slightly but remaining warm in many areas.

angles.name: Summer Continues
angles.copy: The summer continues across the UK! While some heat has eased, it's still feeling warm in many places. What are your weekend plans?

angles.name: Weather Check
angles.copy: Enjoying the slightly cooler but still warm temperatures this weekend? Perfect for getting out and about!
